guardrailCommands: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const s=fs.readFileSync('packages/agent-mux/cli/tests/live-stack/primary-live-runner.ts','utf8'); if (/executePtyStartupFallback|toBridgedInteractiveExecution|withBridgedInteractiveArgs|fell back|node-pty startup failed/.test(s)) { console.error('live-stack PTY runner still contains rejected fallback behavior'); process.exit(1); }"
acceptanceCriteria: The live-stack interactive path must use real PTY-based execution on macOS ARM64 CI runners.
Do not use bridge-interactive, child-process bridged mode, or non-interactive execution as a fallback for node-pty startup failure.
If node-pty itself is kept, fix its installation/build/runtime availability for darwin-arm64; otherwise replace it with another native PTY implementation that preserves TTY semantics.
Existing bridge-interactive feature tests may remain for the bridge feature, but live-stack interactive macOS support must not depend on bridge-interactive fallback.
The fix must preserve command transcript/artifact behavior and targeted live-stack verification.
nonGoals: Do not remove interactive live-stack coverage.
Do not silently skip macOS ARM64 interactive lanes.
Do not add a bridge-interactive fallback in primary live-stack execution.
Do not refactor unrelated agent-mux CLI behavior.
